summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of redesigned Fesa Global website. All major features working correctly including hero section with centered globe, CTA section, testimonials with user submission form, and navigation.

ui_bugs.issue: Scroll button has animation instability causing click timeouts
ui_bugs.workaround: Manual scrolling works fine, button functionality is not critical

passed_tests: Hero section displays centered globe with FesaGlobal branding
Tagline shows 'Your Career in Europe Starts Here'
WhatsApp and Email buttons in hero work correctly
CTA section appears after hero scroll with correct content
Testimonials section has 'Share Your Story' button
Testimonial form shows all required fields (photo upload, name, role, location, story)
Navigation links work correctly (Home, Services, Regions, About, Stories)
Clean logo without F icon box displays correctly
Get Started button present and functional
